briefs.title: Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation amended — new Schedule 1 entries take effect February 4
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 5/2026 amends the Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation (B.C. Reg. 175/2004) by adding new entries to Schedule 1, effective February 4, 2026. The change expands the list of bylaw contraventions subject to ticketing under the Local Government Bylaw Notice Enforcement Act.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated Schedule 1 to identify any new ticketable bylaw offences that apply to your operations.

key_dates.label: BC Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Schedule 1 amendments take effect

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Retail
